nasb.text: The highway of the upright is to depart from evil; He who watches his way preserves his life.

esv.text: The highway of the upright turns aside from evil; whoever guards his way preserves his life.

cnv.text: 正直人的大道遠離罪惡； 謹守自己道路的，保全自己的性命。

ccb.text: 正直人的大道远离罪恶， 坚守正道的保全性命。

csbs.text: 正直人的大道，远离恶事； 谨守自己道路的，保守自己的性命。
